name: Larry Campbell
abstract: Larry Campbell (born February 21, 1955) is an American singer and multi-instrumentalist who plays many stringed instruments (including guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar, slide guitar, and violin) in genres including country, folk, blues, and rock. Campbell is best known for his time as part of Bob Dylan's Never Ending Tour band from 1…

about_quotes.speaker: Catherine Russell
about_quotes.evidence: I was able to, you know Larry Campbell, who produced that album is a multi-instrumentalist obviously, and I was able to guide him in a violin line that I wanted him to play you know.
